creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Thanks for committing this, Rodrigo, but please remove the "LICENSE" line again.

I prefer not to use the LICENSE goo in my ports until it's either properly documented or declared non-optional. For details see the discussion in:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=187926

Please also note that zsd doesn't actually use the 'BSD 2-clause "Simplified" License' so the change also seems technically incorrect to me.
